---
title: "Self-installing R packages on BlueBEAR"
description: |
  James Carpenter from the BEAR Apps team in ARC speaks about how to perform self-installation of R packages on
  the heterogeneous BlueBEAR HPC cluster (including use on BEAR Portal).
author:
  - name: James Carpenter
date: 2026-05-19
categories:
  - talks
  - packages
image: "../../images/logo_rug.png"
draft: true
lightbox: true # N.B. need blank line between photos for this to work
---

## Overview

## Event details

**Date:** 2026-05-19

**Time:** 15:00

**Location:** Elm House

**Teams**: [TEAMS LINK](url)

## About the speaker

## Resources

- [Slides](URL){target="_blank"} [or add pptx/pdf to directory]

<iframe class="slide-deck ar16x9" src="URL" title="Slides">
</iframe>

<!--

## Photos

Add after the event

![](media/IMG1.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/IMG2.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/IMG3.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

-->
